      About us

      Welcome to Melbourne Threads. Founded in 2004, we are a family-run fashion house.

      Inspired by our esteemed predecessors by love of style, we see clothing as more than just a purchase—it’s an extension of your identity. We curate trends that reflect your individuality. Join us on a journey where fashion becomes self-expression and feeling confident is essential.

      Business Hours

      We're here for you day and night

      Need help? Get in touch with our customer service.

      📧 info@melbournethreads.com
      📍 Melbourne

      Our team is available 7 days a week, don't hesitate to contact us!

      Customer service opening hours:
      Monday - Friday 09:00 - 20:00
      Saturday and Sunday 10:00 - 17:00
